Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-18 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long LINC dominates today's rankings with a score of 95.3 and #1 position, displaying exceptional long-term momentum across all timeframes—particularly its 1314% ten-year return and 512% five-year return that dwarf SPY by over 1000 percentage points. The stock passes all four momentum ratio thresholds and sits above all major moving averages, with a clean momentum signal and confirmed volatility pattern supporting a strong_buy flag. FTI ranks second with solid intermediate momentum (130% one-year, 633% five-year) but shows a notable structural breakdown: its ten-year return of 215% trails its five-year by a 0.34 ratio, and it underperforms SPY by 20.6% over the past decade, suggesting the secular trend may have shifted. Both tickers pass all moving average filters and maintain positive ratio passes, but LINC's consistent outperformance across all comparison periods (SPY, QQQ, IAU) marks it as the clearer long-term momentum candidate, while FTI's recent strength appears confined to the five-year window.
